name: Clam Linquine
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Pkg dried linguine or spaghetti, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Freshly grated Parmesan cheese
2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add garlic and sauté gently until just golden, about 1 minute. Do not let garlic brown.
4. Add clams and their liquid, red pepper, oregano, and lemon juice to the skillet.
5. Simmer for 3-5 minutes over low heat.
6. Stir in parsley and cook an additional minute.
7. Place cooked pasta in a serving bowl.
8. Pour some sauce over the pasta and toss to coat the strands.
9. Pour the remaining sauce over top of the pasta.
10. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
11. Makes 3-4 servings.
